name: power-chat
description: 思考画布 (Thinking Canvas) - 为深度思考而设计的对话画布
author: zww0019

scripts.dev: concurrently -n mock,proto -c blue,green "pnpm -C mock-server dev" "pnpm -C prototype dev"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n vite,electron -c green,magenta "pnpm -C prototype dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && pnpm -C electron dev"
scripts.type-check: pnpm -C electron type-check && pnpm -C mock-server type-check
scripts.test: POWER_CHAT_DB=/tmp/power-chat-test.json USE_MOCK_LLM=1 USE_MOCK_TOOLS=1 concurrently -k -s first -n mock,test -c blue,green "pnpm -C mock-server dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/projects && pnpm -C tests test"
scripts.test:watch: POWER_CHAT_DB=/tmp/power-chat-test.json USE_MOCK_LLM=1 USE_MOCK_TOOLS=1 concurrently -k -s first -n mock,test -c blue,green "pnpm -C mock-server dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/projects && pnpm -C tests test:watch"
scripts.build:mac: pnpm -C prototype build && pnpm -C electron build:electron && pnpm -C electron dist:mac
scripts.build:win: pnpm -C prototype build && pnpm -C electron build:electron && pnpm -C electron dist:win
scripts.build:linux: pnpm -C prototype build && pnpm -C electron build:electron && pnpm -C electron dist:linux
